ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "conflict" INTEGER /* Number of conflict incidents */,
  "disaster" INTEGER /* Number of disaster incidents */,
  "disease" INTEGER /* Number of disease incidents */,
  "fund" INTEGER /* Number of fund-related incidents */,
  "political" INTEGER /* Number of political incidents */,
  "water_insecurity" INTEGER /* Number of water insecurity incidents */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the event */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the event location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the event location */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., natural disaster, conflict) */,
  "severity_level" INTEGER /* Severity level of the event (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the incident type (e.g., Conflict, Disaster) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident type */,
  "parent_type_id" INTEGER /* Parent type ID (for hierarchical relationships) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_details" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the incident is part of */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the incident */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the incident occurred */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the incident location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the incident location */,
  "severity" INTEGER /* Severity level of the incident (1-5) */,
  "response_team" TEXT /* Name of the response team assigned to the incident */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the incident (e.g., ongoing, resolved) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the incident */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_details_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_details_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES incident_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, policymaker, field operative) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being accessed */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incident_details ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "access_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the report has been accessed */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, analysis, forecast) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_feeds" (
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news feed */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the news source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the news source */,
  "feed_date" TEXT /* Date the news feed was published */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "government_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each government report */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the government agency */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was published */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ngo_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each NGO update */,
  "ngo_name" TEXT /* Name of the non-governmental organization */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update was published */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the update */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., news feed, government report) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
